response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The vocal audio aligns perfectly with the provided Japanese reference lyrics and the on-screen burnt-in subtitles.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the reference lyrics and translated them contextually, matching on-screen variations (such as 'トランクに詰めて' instead of 'トラックに載せて').
3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were matched tightly to vocal triggers. Transitions between rapid lines were made instantaneous to prevent any delay. Prominent on-screen title cards were subtitled as silent visual events during song transitions.

subtitles.original: Don Pach Don Pach Don 今日で
subtitles.english: Don Pach Don Pach Don, starting today...

subtitles.original: とことん交尾する日本通り
subtitles.english: Mating all the way on Japan Avenue!

subtitles.original: とっちとっちとっちとっ調子
subtitles.english: In a groove groove groove groove!

subtitles.original: ぶち壊していくぜ日本通理だば
subtitles.english: We're gonna wreck it, the Japanese way!

subtitles.original: うわー！
subtitles.english: Whoa!

subtitles.original: [お米の美味しい炊き方、そしてお米を食べることによるその効果。]
subtitles.english: [How to cook delicious rice, and the effects of eating rice.]

subtitles.original: O!
subtitles.english: O!

subtitles.original: K.O!
subtitles.english: K.O!

subtitles.original: M.E!
subtitles.english: M.E!

subtitles.original: RICE! おこめこめ
subtitles.english: RICE! Rice, rice!

subtitles.original: O!
subtitles.english: O!

subtitles.original: K.O!
subtitles.english: K.O!

subtitles.original: M.E!
subtitles.english: M.E!

subtitles.original: RICE! おこめこめ RICE!
subtitles.english: RICE! Rice, rice! RICE!

subtitles.original: SUPER POWER RELAXATION
subtitles.english: Super Power Relaxation!

subtitles.original: 1) 1合150cc正確無比に量ること
subtitles.english: 1) Measure 1 cup of 150cc with absolute precision.

subtitles.original: 2) 次に洗いだが直接米にお水をあてず2本指で
subtitles.english: 2) Next is washing, but don't pour water directly onto the rice, use two fingers...

subtitles.original: 3) お水を量りJOIN!するのだがその米の1.2倍
subtitles.english: 3) Measure the water and JOIN! But the amount should be 1.2 times the rice.

subtitles.original: その後は2時間ほどサディスティックにお水に浸して
subtitles.english: After that, soak it in water sadistically for about 2 hours.

subtitles.original: ジャーの電源
subtitles.english: Power on the rice cooker!

subtitles.original: 陽炎のような
subtitles.english: Like a heat haze...

subtitles.original: スチーム
subtitles.english: Steam!

subtitles.original: 底から
subtitles.english: From the bottom...

subtitles.original: かき混ぜて
subtitles.english: Stir it up!

subtitles.original: おこめ おこめこめ ビタミン ミネラル 食物繊維
subtitles.english: Rice, rice, rice! Vitamins, minerals, dietary fiber!

subtitles.original: おこめ おこめこめ あ～食べてどすこい どすこい
subtitles.english: Rice, rice, rice! Ah, eat it up, dosukoi dosukoi!

subtitles.original: おこめ おこめこめ おすもうさんのPowerをGET
subtitles.english: Rice, rice, rice! GET the power of a sumo wrestler!

subtitles.original: おこめこめ おこめこめ あぁ抱いてロマンティックに
subtitles.english: Rice, rice! Rice, rice! Ah, hold me romantically...

subtitles.original: NIGHT FLIGHT
subtitles.english: ...on a NIGHT FLIGHT!

subtitles.original: おこめ おこめこめ 4) 米屋のあの子をたぶらかそう！
subtitles.english: Rice, rice, rice! 4) Let's seduce that girl from the rice shop!

subtitles.original: 炊き放題 食べ放題 SO I LOVE YOU GET DAZEー！
subtitles.english: All-you-can-cook, all-you-can-eat, SO I LOVE YOU GET DAZE!

subtitles.original: おこめ おこめこめ SUPER ENERGY MIRACLE POWER
subtitles.english: Rice, rice, rice! SUPER ENERGY MIRACLE POWER!

subtitles.original: おこめこめ おこめこめ
subtitles.english: Rice, rice! Rice, rice!

subtitles.original: あぁんおこめ あぁおこめ
subtitles.english: Ah, rice! Ah, rice!

subtitles.original: 5) おこめおいしい
subtitles.english: 5) Rice is delicious!

subtitles.original: [Homesick Pt.2&3]
subtitles.english: [Homesick Pt.2&3]

subtitles.original: 真昼と真夜中の間に立つ歌は
subtitles.english: The song standing between noon and midnight...

subtitles.original: 真っ白なゲームといって耳もとではしゃぐ
subtitles.english: ...plays a snow-white game and chatters in my ear.

subtitles.original: パーフェクト 僕らは完璧…なんて軽い冗談だった
subtitles.english: "Perfect, we are perfect..." was just a light joke.

subtitles.original: いつも答えは 127の項目
subtitles.english: The answer is always the 127 items.

subtitles.original: アスファルト蹴りあげたらトランプで決めて
subtitles.english: Once we kick up the asphalt, we'll decide with cards...

subtitles.original: 急ぎ足で駆け出すのさ 今すぐバスで
subtitles.english: ...and rush out right now on the bus.

subtitles.original: そしてホームシック抱えながら人々は目指す
subtitles.english: And while carrying our homesickness, people aim...

subtitles.original: 行き先はスマートに決めて 願いを叶えたいのなら
subtitles.english: ...to smartly decide the destination, if they want their wishes to come true.

subtitles.original: 真夏と真冬の間に生まれた歌は
subtitles.english: The song born between midsummer and midwinter...

subtitles.original: まったりなカーブ描いてどこまでも進む
subtitles.english: ...draws a relaxed curve and advances forever.

subtitles.original: パーフェクト 全ては同じ…似たもの同士だった
subtitles.english: "Perfect, everything is the same..." we were two of a kind.

subtitles.original: いつも答えは同じ音なんだ
subtitles.english: The answer is always the same sound.

subtitles.original: ソフトロックで暴れたら
subtitles.english: If we go wild with soft rock...

subtitles.original: トークバックで yeah!
subtitles.english: ...yeah! With talkback!

subtitles.original: 差し出したルール 12月のスポーツ
subtitles.english: The presented rule, a December sport.

subtitles.original: バジルパスタの試食
subtitles.english: A tasting of basil pasta.

subtitles.original: 明日の噂話をトランクに詰めて
subtitles.english: Packing tomorrow's rumors into the trunk...

subtitles.original: 逆回しでやり直すのさ 悪い性格
subtitles.english: ...we start over in reverse, our bad personalities.

subtitles.original: それでホームシック語りながら人々は祈る
subtitles.english: And so, talking about homesickness, people pray...

subtitles.original: 行き先は満ちあふれてる 誰かが待ちわびるから
subtitles.english: ...for the destination is overflowing, because someone is waiting.
